description:
Navigate to https://silfratech.in/miraq/v4/,
a. It will first ask for the name, give it as Harshith S
b. later it will ask for email, give silfra.harshith@gmail.com
c. then it will ask for otp give it as 123456, and submit and wait for response and then do next step
d. Confirm the widget shows successful verification or login-complete style confirmation text. After verification, perform the post-login navigation: use the in-widget back action to move out of the current conversation panel.
e. Then click the folder icon (Documents) in the bottom widget toolbar, next to the chat icon, and open Documents.
f. Wait until the file list is visible, then click Validate Content for the first file only.
g. Mark this complete case success only if all the steps are completed and passed
